description: Codex CLI invoked successfully; two findings returned, normalized to canonical envelope.

content.text: [{"finding_id":"security.handleLogin.missing-csrf-check","severity":"high","category":"security","title":"Missing CSRF check in handleLogin","description":"The handleLogin function does not validate CSRF tokens, allowing cross-site request forgery attacks.","file":"src/auth/handleLogin.ts","symbol":"handleLogin","line_range":null,"confidence":"high"},{"finding_id":"maintainability.tokenStore.unbounded-cache","severity":"medium","category":"maintainability","title":"Unbounded in-memory token cache in TokenStore","description":"The token cache in TokenStore grows indefinitely; no eviction policy or max-size cap is applied, risking OOM under sustained load.","file":"src/auth/tokenStore.ts","symbol":"TokenStore","line_range":null,"confidence":"medium"}]
